'''ngaroko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thamnosmin|thamnosmin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thamnosmin|thamnosmin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngaroko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæreketh|ngæreketh]] || [[word:ngærekej|ngærekej]] || [[word:ngærekesh|ngærekesh]] || [[word:ngæreke|ngæreke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngarorokoth|ngarorokoth]] || [[word:ngarorokoj|ngarorokoj]] || [[word:ngarorokosh|ngarorokosh]] || [[word:ngaroroko|ngaroroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngarokoth|ngarokoth]] || [[word:ngarokoj|ngarokoj]] || [[word:ngarokosh|ngarokosh]] || [[word:ngaroko|ngaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarofkoth|ngarofkoth]] || [[word:ngarofkoj|ngarofkoj]] || [[word:ngarofkosh|ngarofkosh]] || [[word:ngarofkof|ngarofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngarokotho|ngarokotho]] || [[word:ngarokojo|ngarokojo]] || [[word:ngarokosho|ngarokosho]] || [[word:ngarokoko|ngarokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngarokoth|ngarokoth]] || [[word:ngarokoj|ngarokoj]] || [[word:ngarokosh|ngarokosh]] || [[word:ngaroko|ngaroko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngarokothol|ngarokothol]] || [[word:ngarokojol|ngarokojol]] || [[word:ngarokoshol|ngarokoshol]] || [[word:ngarokokol|ngarokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngarokothotho|ngarokothotho]] || [[word:ngarokojojo|ngarokojojo]] || [[word:ngarokoshosho|ngarokoshosho]] || [[word:ngarokoko|ngarokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngarokothon|ngarokothon]] || [[word:ngarokojon|ngarokojon]] || [[word:ngarokoshon|ngarokoshon]] || [[word:ngarokokon|ngarokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngarokothoro|ngarokothoro]] || [[word:ngarokojoro|ngarokojoro]] || [[word:ngarokoshoro|ngarokoshoro]] || [[word:ngarokokoro|ngarokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
